# Philippines Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Philippines's administrative hierarchy:
> 17 regions, 84 provinces, 1,634 municipalitys, 42,036 barangays.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 17
- Total provinces: 84
- Total municipalitys: 1,634
- Total barangays: 42,036
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-12
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All provinces (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-province.json)
- [All municipalitys (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-municipality.json)
- [All barangays (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-barangay.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Ilocos Region](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ilocos-region-R01/) — 4 provinces, 125 municipalitys, 3265 barangays
- [Cagayan Valley](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/cagayan-valley-R02/) — 5 provinces, 93 municipalitys, 2311 barangays
- [Central Luzon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/central-luzon-R03/) — 7 provinces, 130 municipalitys, 3102 barangays
- [CALABARZON](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/calabarzon-R04A/) — 5 provinces, 142 municipalitys, 4018 barangays
- [Bicol Region](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bicol-region-R05/) — 6 provinces, 114 municipalitys, 3471 barangays
- [Western Visayas](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/western-visayas-R06/) — 6 provinces, 133 municipalitys, 4051 barangays
- [Central Visayas](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/central-visayas-R07/) — 4 provinces, 132 municipalitys, 3003 barangays
- [Eastern Visayas](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/eastern-visayas-R08/) — 6 provinces, 143 municipalitys, 4390 barangays
- [Zamboanga Peninsula](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/zamboanga-peninsula-R09/) — 4 provinces, 72 municipalitys, 1904 barangays
- [Northern Mindanao](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/northern-mindanao-R10/) — 5 provinces, 93 municipalitys, 2022 barangays
- [Davao Region](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/davao-region-R11/) — 5 provinces, 49 municipalitys, 1162 barangays
- [SOCCSKSARGEN](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/soccsksargen-R12/) — 5 provinces, 50 municipalitys, 1195 barangays
- [National Capital Region](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/national-capital-region-NCR/) — 1 provinces, 17 municipalitys, 1706 barangays
- [Cordillera Administrative Region](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/cordillera-administrative-region-CAR/) — 6 provinces, 77 municipalitys, 1176 barangays
- [Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/autonomous-region-in-muslim-mindanao-ARMM/) — 5 provinces, 118 municipalitys, 2490 barangays
- [Caraga](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/caraga-R13/) — 5 provinces, 73 municipalitys, 1311 barangays
- [MIMAROPA Region](https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mimaropa-region-R17/) — 5 provinces, 73 municipalitys, 1459 barangays

- [Western Visayas](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/western-visayas-R06.txt)
- [Central Visayas](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/central-visayas-R07.txt)
- [Eastern Visayas](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/eastern-visayas-R08.txt)
- [Zamboanga Peninsula](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/zamboanga-peninsula-R09.txt)
- [Northern Mindanao](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/northern-mindanao-R10.txt)
- [Davao Region](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/davao-region-R11.txt)
- [SOCCSKSARGEN](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/soccsksargen-R12.txt)
- [National Capital Region](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/national-capital-region-NCR.txt)
- [Cordillera Administrative Region](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/cordillera-administrative-region-CAR.txt)
- [Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/autonomous-region-in-muslim-mindanao-ARMM.txt)
- [Caraga](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/caraga-R13.txt)
- [MIMAROPA Region](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mimaropa-region-R17.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (province), 3 (municipality), 4 (barangay)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Philippines Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/philippines-administrative-divisions
